# Load the user's response text from the provided file
path = '/mnt/data/file-WB2WAcpxHMJ5cPDGAoJZhU-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
text, len(text)

# Find indices of double quotes
indices = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
indices, [text[i-5:i+5] for i in indices]

span1 = text[98:144]
span2 = text[172:225]
span1, len(span1), span2, len(span2)

أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَتَكُونَ لَهُمْ قُلُوبٌ يَعْقِلُونَ بِهَا quranic_verses.json
إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَنْ كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى السَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ quranic_verses.json
أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَتَكُونَ لَهُمْ
إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَنْ كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ
أفلم يسيروا في الأرض فتكون لهم قلوب
إن في ذلك لذكرى لمن كان له قلب أو ألقى السمع

assert text[start2:end2] == 'إن في ذلك لذكرى لمن كان له قلب أو ألقى السمع وهو شهيد'

# Define corrected texts as per memory
corr1 = "أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَتَكُونَ لَهُمْ قُلُوبٌ يَعْقِلُونَ بِهَا أَوْ آذَانٌ يَسْمَعُونَ بِهَا ۖ فَإِنَّهَا لَا تَعْمَى الْأَبْصَارُ وَلَـٰكِنْ تَعْمَى الْقُلُوبُ الَّتِي فِي الصُّدُورِ"
corr2 = "إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَنْ كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى السَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ"

def codepoints(s):
    return [hex(ord(ch)) for ch in s]

len(corr1), len(corr2), codepoints("ذَٰ"), codepoints("لَـٰ")[:5]

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":98,"span_end":144,"span_text":"أفلم يسيروا في الأرض فتكون لهم قلوب يبصرون بها","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"الحج","sura_number":22,"aya_number":46},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"أَفَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا فِي الْأَرْضِ فَتَكُونَ لَهُمْ قُلُوبٌ يَعْقِلُونَ بِهَا أَوْ آذَانٌ يَسْمَعُونَ بِهَا ۖ فَإِنَّهَا لَا تَعْمَى الْأَبْصَارُ وَلَـٰكِنْ تَعْمَى الْقُلُوبُ الَّتِي فِي الصُّدُورِ","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":172,"span_end":225,"span_text":"إن في ذلك لذكرى لمن كان له قلب أو ألقى السمع وهو شهيد","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"ق","sura_number":50,"aya_number":37},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَنْ كَانَ لَهُ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى السَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
